source.data:
@smoke
Feature: Input and Output of Files
@Files
Scenario Outline: Uploading and dowloading Files
  Given user navigates to Files upload-download page
  When user uploads Files using filepath "<filepath>"
  Then Validate the Upload Files using filename "<uploadfilename>"
  When user downloads file to "<savepath>"
  Then Validate downloaded file in "<savepath>" with filename "<filename>"

Examples:
      | filepath                                                                                      | uploadFilename | savepath                                                                                     | filename        |
      | C:\Users\sakethram.n\OneDrive - TECHNOVERT SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED\Desktop\Filssss\HIII.txt | HIII.txt       | C:\Users\sakethram.n\OneDrive - TECHNOVERT SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED\Desktop\Filssss         | sampleFile.jpeg |

steps.text: user navigates to Files upload-download page
Validate the Upload Files using filename "<uploadfilename>"
Validate downloaded file in "<savepath>" with filename "<filename>"
user navigates to Files upload-download page
user uploads Files using filepath "C:\Users\sakethram.n\OneDrive - TECHNOVERT SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED\Desktop\Filssss\HIII.txt"
Validate the Upload Files using filename "<uploadfilename>"
user downloads file to "C:\Users\sakethram.n\OneDrive - TECHNOVERT SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED\Desktop\Filssss"
Validate downloaded file in "C:\Users\sakethram.n\OneDrive - TECHNOVERT SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED\Desktop\Filssss" with filename "sampleFile.jpeg"
